title: Genomic determinants of response to alpelisib plus fulvestrant in the SOLAR-1 trial.
abstract: Approximately 40% of patients with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative advanced breast cancer (ABC) have PIK3CA alterations, which contributes to endocrine therapy resistance. Alpelisib, an α-selective phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase inhibitor and degrader, given in combination with fulvestrant, is approved for the treatment of PIK3CA-mutated, HR-positive, HER2-negative ABC, based on the results of the SOLAR-1 trial (NCT02437318). Aside from PIK3CA, other gene alterations are associated with poor prognosis and limited response to treatment in this patient population.
